title: Eat Sand
description: A mod where you can consume sand
body:
This is a Minecraft mod where you can eat sand. Inspired by Yahiamice's video where he had players consume the most sand. I have recreated that, but with my own original ideas.

 

Here are some things about the mod:
- Eating sand can be done by right clicking.
- Eating sand heals you (like in the video).
- Eating sandstone or any other block that isn't as soft as sand will hurt you, because the - - block would be very hard and sharp.
- Eating red sand is very spicy. You will be set on fire in the process of consumption.
- Eating soul sand hurts!
- You can eat suspicious sand without a problem, just like normal sand.
- The mod should work in multiplayer.
